issue: Uses obsolete --outdir and omits required --project when calling optimized pipeline
recommended fix: Replace --outdir with --project and align wrapper args with current CLI

issue: --skip-cellranger and --skip-scanpy options do not change execution flow
impact: Unsafe reruns and misleading control behavior
evidence: run_end_to_end.sh lines 215-220 only print text; main still runs both stages
recommended fix: Implement real conditional branches in main based on parsed flags

issue: Conda environment check is incorrect (false negatives)
impact: Script aborts even when environment exists
evidence: run_end_to_end.sh line 52 uses grep pattern with leading+trailing spaces; dry-run failed while sc10x exists
recommended fix: Use robust check: conda env list | awk '{print $1}' | grep -Fx \$CONDA_ENV\""

issue: Default output root is relative (../output) and CWD-dependent
impact: Boundary leakage and non-reproducible output location
evidence: scanpy_pipeline_optimized.py lines 74 and 618; run from repo root attempted write outside module
recommended fix: Resolve output root from script directory and normalize to absolute path

issue: Default output root is relative (../output) and CWD-dependent
impact: Same boundary/reproducibility risk as optimized pipeline

issue: max_ribo_pct configured but never used in filtering
impact: Configuration is misleading; expected QC control is absent
evidence: max_ribo_pct only defined in config line 43 and never referenced elsewhere
recommended fix: Either apply ribosomal threshold in filter mask or remove option from config/docs

issue: Default PBMC QC is too stringent for this dataset (mt<5)
evidence: audit_default filtering_stats.csv: 151/1221 cells retained (12.4%); mt<5 passes only 157 cells
recommended fix: Relax defaults (e.g. mt<10-15 for PBMC-like data) or make dataset-aware defaults mandatory

issue: Doublet detection silently degrades to all non-doublet on failure
impact: False sense of QC completeness; no actual doublet removal
evidence: run logs: Scrublet failed due missing skimage, then predicted_doublet=False for all
recommended fix: Fail hard by default or emit explicit pipeline status flag and stop when doublet mode is requested but unavailable

issue: doublet_threshold option is parsed but never used
evidence: Config set at lines 795-796 but never passed to scrublet call line 268
recommended fix: Pass threshold to scrublet API and test behavior

issue: gene_ids mode breaks MT/ribo detection and marker panel lookups
impact: QC and marker plots become biologically invalid in gene_ids mode
evidence: MT genes flagged 0/38606 when var_names=gene_ids; canonical marker lookup fails
recommended fix: When var_names=gene_ids, use var['gene_symbols'] for QC flags and marker matching

issue: No actual cell-type annotation assignment implemented
impact: No reproducible cell-type labels; conclusions remain manual and weak
evidence: No cell_type assignment in code; only plotting markers
recommended fix: Add explicit annotation function producing obs['cell_type'] and confidence score per cluster/cell

issue: Claims final cell type annotation although code does not perform label assignment
evidence: README overview and report claims vs absence of annotation output column
recommended fix: Update docs to match reality or implement annotation stage

issue: No environment lock/spec file despite script/docs referencing environment.yml
evidence: No environment.yml/requirements.txt found; wrapper error suggests missing file
recommended fix: Provide environment.yml (or lockfile) covering scanpy/scrublet/skimage/leiden stack

issue: Scanpy import fails in this environment unless NUMBA_CACHE_DIR is set
evidence: Direct script invocation failed with numba caching RuntimeError until NUMBA_CACHE_DIR set
recommended fix: Document and set required env vars in wrapper or environment activation script

evidence: No random_state arguments in UMAP/Leiden calls
recommended fix: Expose and set seed parameter in config and logs

issue: Still uses old --outdir examples incompatible with current CLI
impact: Users following docs will fail runs or mis-route outputs
recommended fix: Update all docs and examples to current --project interface

issue: Default run produced under-resolved PBMC structure (3 clusters from 151 cells)
impact: Weak lineage interpretability and increased false annotation risk
evidence: audit_default cluster_counts.csv and marker summaries show collapsed mixed clusters
recommended fix: Do not use default output for biological claims; rerun with data-driven QC and verify lineage markers

issue: Isolation guarantee is overstated relative to actual path behavior
impact: Potential mixing of outputs and ambiguous provenance
evidence: run_end_to_end intends cellranger_out/analysis; scripts use CWD-relative output; docs claim strict isolation
recommended fix: Enforce absolute namespaced output root and add run manifest with explicit input/output paths
